zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Arundel於1244年出生在英國斯塔福爾特哈爾時，她的父親John FitzAlan II21歲，母親Maud de Verdun19歲。她於1280年與Robert Corbet在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1309年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Arundel于1244年出生在英国斯塔福爾特哈爾时，她的父亲John FitzAlan II21岁，母亲Maud de Verdun19岁。她于1280年与Robert Corbet在英国英格兰史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1309年在英国英格兰史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Arundel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

variants.name: Arrindell
meanings: West Indian (Dutch Caribbean and the Dominican Republic): probably an altered form of English   Arundel  .

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Arundel was born in 1244, in Tettenhall, Staffordshire, England, her father, John FitzAlan II, was 21 and her mother, Maud de Verdun, was 19. She married Robert Corbet in 1280, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1309, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Arundel est née en 1244, à Tettenhall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, John FitzAlan II, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Maud de Verdun, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Corbet en 1280, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1309, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1280 in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Robert Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1309 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Robert Corbet nel 1280, nel Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Arundelが1244年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアテッテンハルで生まれた時，父John FitzAlan IIは21歳，母Maud de Verdunは19歳であった。1280年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットでRobert Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1309年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Arundel(이)가 1244년 영국 스태퍼드실르 테텐홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John FitzAlan II(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Verdun(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 Robert Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1309년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Arundel nasceu em 1244, em Tettenhall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John FitzAlan II, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Verdun, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Corbet em 1280, em Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1309, em Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Arundel родилась в 1244 г. в местности теттенолл, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John FitzAlan II было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Maud de Verdun, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Corbet в 1280 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1309 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.
